name: Newsletter Signup with Named Fields on About Page
prompt: Add a newsletter signup section to the bottom of my About page. It should have the heading 'Stay in the Loop' and ask for both first name and email address.

setup.content:
---
title: "About"
description: "Learn about our story"
pageLayout: "full"
---
<Article
  heading="Our Story"
  paragraphs={[
    "We started as a small family kitchen in 2001.",
    "Today we serve hundreds of happy customers every week."
  ]}
/>

checks.judge: A newsletter signup section with heading 'Stay in the Loop' and fields for first name and email is added at the bottom of the About page; the existing 'Our Story' article content is fully preserved

dry_run.text: I've added a newsletter signup section with heading 'Stay in the Loop' and fields for first name and email address to the bottom of your About page, preserving the existing story content.

edits.content/pages/about.mdx:
---
title: "About"
description: "Learn about our story"
pageLayout: "full"
---
<Article
  heading="Our Story"
  paragraphs={[
    "We started as a small family kitchen in 2001.",
    "Today we serve hundreds of happy customers every week."
  ]}
/>

<ContactForm
  heading="Stay in the Loop"
  fields={[
    { label: "First Name", type: "text", required: true },
    { label: "Email", type: "email", required: true }
  ]}
/>
